openai/whisper-large-v3.description: OpenAI Whisper large v3 via Together's OpenAI-compatible transcription API
openai/whisper-large-v3.pricingNotes: Together AI Whisper transcription is estimated at $0.09/hour. Free credits, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Together documents local file uploads and public URLs for wav, mp3, m4a, webm, and flac. Public docs do not publish a precise hard upload cap in the transcription API reference, so AutoShow keeps split policy notes-only and relies on retry-with-split when the provider rejects an oversized payload.
